title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.455 - Attorney general to seek restitution for department
text:
630.455.  Attorney general to seek restitution for department. — The attorney general shall represent the department to seek restitution of any moneys dispensed under this chapter which have been misappropriated, fraudulently obtained or overpaid.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
